feed.title: Aravind
feed.subtitle: Cybersecurity research notes, threat detection, and blue team operations.

entry.title: Building a SOC Lab
entry.content:
Introduction

This article explains how I built a SOC lab using Splunk and log analysis.

Architecture

  • Windows endpoint
  • Sysmon logs
  • Splunk forwarder
  • Splunk SIEM

entry.title: Threat Hunting with Splunk
entry.content:
Threat hunting is a proactive activity where analysts search for hidden threats.

Example SPL query:
entry.summary: Threat hunting is a proactive activity where analysts search for hidden threats.

entry.title: Writing SIEM Detection Rules
entry.content:
Detection engineering focuses on identifying malicious activity through log analysis.

Example detection logic:

  • Multiple failed logins
  • Privilege escalation events
  • Suspicious PowerShell execution
entry.summary: Detection engineering focuses on identifying malicious activity through log analysis.

entry.title: Common Active Directory Attacks
entry.content:
Active Directory environments introduce several attack vectors.

Kerberoasting

Attackers request service tickets and crack them offline.

Pass-the-Hash

Authentication occurs using NTLM hashes rather than plaintext passwords.
entry.summary: Active Directory environments introduce several attack vectors.

entry.title: Malware Analysis Basics
entry.content:
Malware analysis is the process of understanding how malicious software behaves.

Static Analysis

Tools:

  • strings
  • PEStudio
  • Detect It Easy

Dynamic Analysis

Tools:

  • Procmon
  • Wireshark
  • Regshot
entry.summary: Malware analysis is the process of understanding how malicious software behaves.

entry.title: Welcome to My Security Blog
entry.content:
This blog documents experiments, research notes, and cybersecurity learning.

Topics include:

  • Threat detection
  • Malware analysis
  • Security monitoring
  • Blue team operations
entry.summary: This blog documents experiments, research notes, and cybersecurity learning.
